properties.description: Detects abnormally large data exports from Dynamics 365 which may indicate insider threat or compromised account data exfiltration. Maps to MITRE ATT&CK T1530 - Data from Cloud Storage.
properties.query:
CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType has_any ("Export", "Download", "FileDownloaded", "FileSyncDownloadedFull")
| summarize
    ExportCount = count(),
    FirstExport = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastExport = max(TimeGenerated),
    ExportedObjects = make_set(ObjectName)
    by AccountDisplayName, AccountObjectId, IPAddress, CountryCode
| where ExportCount >= 10
| extend
    MITRETechnique = "T1530 - Data from Cloud Storage",
    RiskLevel = iff(ExportCount >= 50, "Critical", "High")
| project
    AccountDisplayName,
    AccountObjectId,
    ExportCount,
    FirstExport,
    LastExport,
    IPAddress,
    CountryCode,
    ExportedObjects,
    MITRETechnique,
    RiskLevel
